channel.title: Projects on Josue Kouka

item.title: oeutils
item.description: OEUTILS oeutils is a small python wrapper of the xml-rpc API for OpenERP. It is useful when it comes to manipulate your OpenERP objects. It …

item.title: Bowee
item.description: What’s BoWee BoWee is a bottle project builder. It generates an project architecture and useful files for bottle projects. It was previously …
